examples: Most teenagers already feel awkward and different, add acne to the equation and they are identifiably different.
The Phyto-Estrogens in our formulation are identifiably bio-identical to the molecules produced by a woman's body.
Woods, multiracial but identifiably black, triumphed in a sport dominated by upper-class white men.
Scott said each generation of young people had produced their own identifiably British youth culture.
Many of the traditionalists see the newcomers, such as Jean-Luc Thunevin, as producing wine that's not identifiably French.
